series_metadata.series_description: Includes, appointment letters, working papers for an external audit, and the final copy of the FTE Reviews of the Community Schools conducted by the Area Coordinators.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Recommended Retention PeriodAfter final review, all records shall be stored at Ohio Department of Education (central office) remainder of retention period. six (6) years final review conducted by Area Coordinators ; Electronic: Recommended Retention PeriodAfter final review, all records shall be stored at Ohio Department of Education (central office) remainder of retention period. six (6) years final review conducted by Area Coordinators
